_meta.description: Full Tivlen daily social content pipeline with WhatsApp approval, 3 variants, Story format, analytics loop, voice memory, and monthly report.
setup_checklist: 1. Google Drive: create folder 'tivlen-quotes/', copy folder ID
2. Google Sheets: create sheet with columns listed in SHEETS_SCHEMA below
3. Anthropic API: get key from console.anthropic.com
4. Twilio: sign up, activate WhatsApp sandbox, get Account SID + Auth Token
5. CloudConvert: sign up, get API key (or use Puppeteer node if self-hosted)
6. Gmail: connect OAuth2 for monthly report
7. Instagram Basic Display API: connect Business account
9. Set all n8n Variables listed in VARIABLES section
10. Import all 5 workflows, activate in order 3 → 4 → 5 → 1 → 2

SHEETS_SCHEMA.columns: row_id | quote_text | pillar | format | scheduled_date | status | variant_a_svg | variant_b_svg | variant_c_svg | variant_a_ig_caption | variant_b_ig_caption | variant_c_ig_caption | variant_a_li_caption | variant_b_li_caption | variant_c_li_caption | approved_variant | ig_post_id | li_post_id | ig_likes | ig_saves | ig_reach | ig_comments | ig_eng_rate | li_reactions | li_impressions | li_comments | posted_at | drive_file_id

WORKFLOW_1_SUNDAY_BATCH.name: Tivlen — Sunday Batch Generator
WORKFLOW_1_SUNDAY_BATCH.description: Runs every Sunday 8am. Picks 7 quote images, calls Claude to generate 3 variants each, stores all in Google Sheets with Mon-Sun schedule.

nodes.name: Pick 7 unused images + build voice context

parameters.message:
={{"✅ *Tivlen batch ready!*

Generated content for this week:
" + $('Pick 7 unused images + build voice context').all().map((item, i) => (i+1) + '. ' + item.json.scheduledDate).join('
') + "

You'll get a WhatsApp at 9am each day to approve before posting. 💛"}}

main.node: Pick 7 unused images + build voice context
Pick 7 unused images + build voice context
Pick 7 unused images + build voice context

WORKFLOW_2_DAILY_APPROVAL.name: Tivlen — Daily Morning Approval
WORKFLOW_2_DAILY_APPROVAL.description: Runs every day at 9am. Reads today's scheduled post from Sheets, sends 3 variant previews to WhatsApp. Auto-posts Variant A at 10am if no reply.

parameters.jsCode:
const post = $input.first().json;
const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {weekday:'long', day:'numeric', month:'long'});

const message = [
  `🌟 *Tivlen — ${today}*`,
  '',
  `📌 *Quote:* "${post.quote_text}"`,
  `🏷 Pillar: ${post.pillar}`,
  '',
  '3 variants are ready. Reply with:',
  '*1* → Post Variant A: ' + post.variant_a_format,
  '*2* → Post Variant B: ' + post.variant_b_format,
  '*3* → Post Variant C: ' + post.variant_c_format,
  '*0* → Skip today',
  '',
  '⏰ No reply by 10am = auto-posts Variant A',
  '',
  '💛 _Captions preview in next messages_'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: {
  row_id: post.row_id,
  message: message,
  ig_caption_a: 'VARIANT A CAPTION:\n' + post.variant_a_ig_caption,
  ig_caption_b: 'VARIANT B CAPTION:\n' + post.variant_b_ig_caption,
  ig_caption_c: 'VARIANT C CAPTION:\n' + post.variant_c_ig_caption
}}];

WORKFLOW_3_WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK.name: Tivlen — WhatsApp Reply Webhook
WORKFLOW_3_WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK.description: Always-on webhook. Receives Anisa's WhatsApp reply (1/2/3/0), renders SVG to PNG, posts to Instagram + LinkedIn, schedules Story.

nodes.name: Twilio WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.note: Set this webhook URL in your Twilio WhatsApp Sandbox 'When a message comes in' field: {{$vars.N8N_WEBHOOK_BASE_URL}}/tivlen-whatsapp-reply

parameters.message:
={{"✅ Variant " + $('Parse reply number').item.json.variantKey.toUpperCase() + " approved!

Posting now:
🟡 Instagram feed: 9am
🟡 Instagram Story: 11am
🟡 LinkedIn: 12pm

💛 Go do great things today Anisa!"}}

nodes.name: Post to Instagram feed

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "image_url": "{{ $('Get feed PNG download URL').item.json.tasks.find(t => t.name === 'export').result.files[0].url }}", "caption": "={{ $('Extract approved variant data').item.json.ig_caption }}", "access_token": "={{ $vars.IG_ACCESS_TOKEN }}" }

nodes.note: Step 1 of 2 for Instagram — creates media container. Must follow with publish step.

nodes.name: Post to LinkedIn
nodes.note: Connect LinkedIn OAuth2 credential. Uses same feed PNG.

parameters.message: 👋 Got it — skipping today's post. See you tomorrow at 9am! 💛

WORKFLOW_4_STORY_POSTER.name: Tivlen — Post Instagram Story at 11am
WORKFLOW_4_STORY_POSTER.description: Runs daily at 11am. Checks Sheets for any pending story. Posts it to Instagram.

WORKFLOW_5_ANALYTICS.name: Tivlen — Engagement Analytics (48h)
WORKFLOW_5_ANALYTICS.description: Runs every day at 11am. Checks for posts that were made 48h ago, fetches engagement from Instagram + LinkedIn, logs to Sheets.

parameters.jsCode:
// We'll read all sheets rows and filter in code for 48h ago
return [{ json: { target_date: new Date(Date.now() - 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0] } }];

WORKFLOW_6_MONTHLY_REPORT.name: Tivlen — Monthly Report Email
WORKFLOW_6_MONTHLY_REPORT.description: Runs on 1st of every month at 9am. Claude reads all posts from previous month, generates a rich HTML performance report, sends via Gmail.

parameters.subject: ={{"💛 Tivlen " + $('Filter + summarise last month').item.json.monthName + " — Monthly Performance Report"}}
